features.title: Why Choose Local FIX?
features.subtitle: We offer more than just a platform
features.securePaymentDescription: Funds are held in escrow and released only after work is confirmed
features.verifiedProvidersDescription: All providers are verified with real reviews
features.satisfactionGuaranteeDescription: Pay only when you are satisfied with the result
features.realReviewsDescription: Read reviews from real customers before choosing
features.competitivePricesDescription: Compare prices and choose the best option for your budget

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied customers and professionals today.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions
faq.a1: Payment is done through our secure platform. Funds are held in escrow until the work is completed.
faq.a2: Yes, all providers undergo an identity and skill verification process.
faq.a3: Registration is free for clients. Providers only pay a small fee for each job won.
faq.q4: What if I am not satisfied?
faq.a4: We offer a satisfaction guarantee. If there are issues, our support team will intervene for a resolution.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of satisfied users trust us every day for their local needs.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Latest news and tips from LocalFIX

footer.description: LocalFIX is the leading platform in Albania for connecting customers with the best local service professionals.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: LocalFIX is the leading platform for connecting individuals with qualified professionals for home and business services. We aim to make the process of finding a reliable professional as simple and secure as possible.

history.title: Our History
history.desc: Founded in Tirana, LocalFIX was born from the need to bring transparency and quality to the local services market.

values.title: Our Values
values.quality: Quality: High standards for every service.
values.transparency: Transparency: Clear prices and no hidden costs.

howItWorksPage.title: How it Works
howItWorksPage.description: Your guide to using the platform

forClients.title: For Clients
forClients.desc: Post, choose, and pay only when the job is done.

forProviders.title: For Providers
forProviders.desc: Find work, build your reputation, and increase your earnings.

trustSafety.title: Trust and Safety
trustSafety.description: Your safety is our top priority

verified.title: Verified Professionals
verified.desc: Every provider goes through a rigorous identity and skill verification process.

payment.title: Payment Protection
payment.desc: Your payments are held securely and released only when you are satisfied with the work.

secure.title: Secure Data
secure.desc: We use the latest encryption technology to protect your data.

standards.title: Community Standards
standards.desc: We do not tolerate any form of fraud, harassment, or unprofessional behavior.

careers.title: Careers
careers.hiringDesc: Are you passionate about technology and local services? We want to know you.

forum.title: Discussion Forums
forum.desc: Talk with other members, exchange home tips, and share your experiences.

expert.title: Ask an Expert
expert.desc: Have a technical question? Get answers from our top professionals.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faqPage.description: Answers to your most common questions
faqPage.a1: Registration and searching for professionals is free for clients. Service providers pay a small percentage for each job won.
faqPage.a2: All professionals are verified and rated by other clients. We constantly monitor their performance.
faqPage.q3: What if I am not satisfied?
faqPage.a3: We have a client protection policy. If the work is not done according to the agreement, we will intervene to resolve the issue or refund you.
faqPage.a4: You can pay securely through the platform. Funds are held blocked until the work is completed.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing and using LocalFIX, you agree to be bound by these terms.

section2.title: 2. Use of Service
section2.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account.

section3.title: 3. Payments and Fees
section3.content: Details about service fees and payment processing.

section4.title: 4. Liability
section4.content: LocalFIX acts as an intermediary and does not hold direct responsibility for the quality of providers' work, although we offer protection mechanisms.

section1.title: Data Collection
section1.content: We collect information you provide us directly, such as name, email, and phone number when you register.

section2.title: Use of Information
section2.content: Your data is used to provide services, improve the platform, and for communication.

section3.title: Data Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

section4.title: Security
section4.content: We take reasonable measures to protect your information from unauthorized access.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.intro: LocalFIX uses cookies to improve your experience on our site.

whatAreCookies.title: What are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website.

types.title: Types of Cookies we use
types.necessary: Necessary: For the functioning of the site (e.g. login).
types.analytical: Analytical: To understand how the site is used.
types.marketing: Marketing: To show you relevant ads.

cookiesPage.control: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings.

fairness.title: Fairness Policy
fairness.content: We always encourage open communication between the client and the professional. In most cases, disputes can be resolved through simple conversation.

howToOpen.title: How to open a case?
howToOpen.step1: Go to job details in your Dashboard.
howToOpen.step2: Click the 'Report Problem' or 'Open Dispute' button.
howToOpen.step3: Explain the situation and upload proof (photos, messages).

process.title: Mediation Process
process.content: Our support team will review the case within 24 hours. We will contact both parties to hear their versions.

important.title: Important:
important.content: Do not make payments outside the platform. We cannot guarantee or protect payments made in cash or direct bank transfers.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.intro: LocalFIX is committed to making its platform accessible to everyone, including people with disabilities.

standards.title: Standards
standards.content: We strive to follow the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1.

accessibility.contact: If you encounter any accessibility issues, please contact us.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.content: All content on this site is property of LocalFIX or its partners.

openSource.title: Open Source Licenses
openSource.content: We use several open source libraries. Here is the list of them and their respective licenses:

sellerApproval.apply: Për të shitur produkte në markatë, duhet të aplikoni për aprovim.

provider.applyDesc: Plotësoni të dhënat tuaja për të filluar ofrimin e shërbimeve.
provider.successDesc: Faleminderit! Kërkesa juaj për t'u bërë profesionist është në proces shqyrtimi. Do të njoftoheni së shpejti.
